title: eulophia flava
intro: Eulophia flava, also known as the Yellow Eulophia or Yellow Orchid, is a species of orchid native to tropical Africa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where its roots and rhizomes are used to treat various ailments. Eulophia flava is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including the relief of fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The plant's roots are often used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed orally or applied topically to harness its medicinal properties.
